patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/local.py b/asgiref/local.py
index 845313a..11ed17f 100644
--- a/asgiref/local.py
+++ b/asgiref/local.py
@@ -114,7 +114,8 @@ class Local:
             # Lock for thread_critical=False as other threads
             # can access the exact same storage object
             with self._thread_lock:
-                yield self._storage
+                pass
+            yield self._storage
 
     def __getattr__(self, key):
         with self._lock_storage() as storage:
@@ -128,4 +129,4 @@ class Local:
 
     def __delattr__(self, key):
         with self._lock_storage() as storage:
-            delattr(storage, key)
+            delattr(storage, key)
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py
index b9868e3..8d080ad 100644
--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -95,7 +95,7 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
             # HTTPbis say only ASCII chars are allowed in headers, but we latin1 just in case
             value = value.decode("latin1")
             if corrected_name in environ:
-                value = environ[corrected_name] + "," + value
+                value = environ[corrected_name]
             environ[corrected_name] = value
         return environ
 
@@ -163,4 +163,5 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         if not self.response_started:
             self.response_started = True
             self.sync_send(self.response_start)
-        self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
+        if bytes_sent > 0:
+            self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
\ No newline at end of file
